input-validation-states.title: Validation states and native input types
input-validation-states.description: A single card shows the basic text scenario, email validation and search mode at once, so native behavior is visible without losing the design-system shell.

input-addons-basic.title: Prefix and suffix add-ons
input-addons-basic.description: Static add-on slots (currency, units) inside the field, without changing the field's overall layout.

input-addon-slots-fit.title: Add-on slots: fixed (clip) vs stretch
input-addon-slots-fit.description: Long prefix/suffix content no longer overflows the field: in fixed mode the add-on keeps its width and clips content (prefix from the right, suffix from the left); in stretch it grows to fit. The two fields on the left drive the add-on content reactively.

input-size-and-alignment.title: Size scale and text alignment
input-size-and-alignment.description: Shows that `GrInput` can live both in compact toolbars and large form layouts, and text alignment is configured separately from size.

input-enhancements.title: Clearable, password toggle, counter and readonly
input-enhancements.description: Built-in field affordances: a clear button (`clearable`), password visibility toggle (`passwordToggle`), character counter with `maxlength` (`showCount`) and a `readonly` state. Button labels are localized.
